content.alt: A Mauritius kestrel perched on a branch

explanation: A real photograph of a Mauritius kestrel taken by wildlife photographer Charles J. Sharp, a Featured Picture on Wikimedia Commons.

content.alt: A stylized fantasy vista of a hillside estate city

explanation: An AI-generated image titled "Greenwood Estates Vista City", created with Midjourney and uploaded to Wikimedia Commons' AI-generated images collection.

source.name: Wikimedia Commons (Category:AI-generated fantasy and mythology images)
source.author: Dennis Sylvester Hurd (Midjourney)

explanation: A real photograph of a duck-billed platypus, taken by Charles J. Sharp and featured on Wikimedia Commons.

content.alt: A domed city on Mars with forests, fields and lakes inside

explanation: An AI-generated science-fiction concept image made with DALL-E 3, depicting a domed Martian city, uploaded to Wikimedia Commons.

content.alt: A hummingbird hawk moth feeding in flight

explanation: A real photograph of a hummingbird hawk moth captured mid-flight by Charles J. Sharp, a Featured Picture on Wikimedia Commons.
An AI-generated concept image of a futuristic airplane, created with Bing Image Creator and uploaded to Wikimedia Commons.

content.alt: A blue-legged chameleon on a branch

explanation: A real photograph of a blue-legged chameleon in Ranomafana, Madagascar, taken by Charles J. Sharp.
An AI-generated "Romantic Fantasy" style image made with DALL-E 3, uploaded to Wikimedia Commons as an example of a generic AI art style.

content.alt: A roughtail rock agama lizard on a rock

explanation: A real photograph of a roughtail rock agama, taken by Charles J. Sharp, a Featured Picture on Wikimedia Commons.

content.alt: A stylized fantasy city skyline at night

explanation: An AI-generated image titled "Night 898", a fantasy-past cityscape created with Midjourney and uploaded to Wikimedia Commons.

source.name: Wikimedia Commons (Category:AI-generated fantasy and mythology images)
source.author: Dennis Sylvester Hurd (Midjourney)

content.alt: A pencil drawing of Baryonyx, a spinosaurid dinosaur

explanation: A real pencil-drawn paleoart illustration of Baryonyx walkeri by paleoartist Nobu Tamura, hand-drawn and uploaded to Wikimedia Commons.

content.alt: A painterly illustration of a seven-headed serpent

explanation: An AI-generated illustration of Lotan, the seven-headed serpent of Canaanite myth, created with Midjourney and uploaded to Wikimedia Commons.

source.name: Wikimedia Commons (Category:AI-generated fantasy and mythology images)
source.author: Midjourney

content.alt: A painted illustration of Elasmosaurus swimming

explanation: A real hand-drawn paleoart illustration of Elasmosaurus platyurus swimming, by paleoartist Nobu Tamura, uploaded to Wikimedia Commons.

content.alt: A blue-toned fantasy illustration of a fairy figure

explanation: An AI-generated fantasy artwork titled "Blue Fairy", uploaded to Wikimedia Commons under a CC0 public domain dedication.

source.name: Wikimedia Commons (Category:AI-generated fantasy and mythology images)
source.author: Andrew Pertsev

content.alt: A pencil drawing of Umoonasaurus, a small plesiosaur

explanation: A real pencil-drawn paleoart illustration of Umoonasaurus demoscyllus by paleoartist Nobu Tamura, hand-drawn and uploaded to Wikimedia Commons.

content.alt: A painterly illustration of a dragon

explanation: An AI-generated dragon illustration uploaded to Wikimedia Commons under a CC BY-SA license.
